name: SageIntacctConnector
description: Connects to Sage Intacct (cloud financial management) via its XML Gateway. Supports readByQuery for any object (CUSTOMER, VENDOR, ARINVOICE, APBILL, GLBATCH, GLACCOUNT, EMPLOYEE, PROJECT, DEPARTMENT, LOCATION), create_customer / create_vendor / create_invoice / update_customer, getAPISession-based session caching, smart events, and per-tenant credential isolation.

install_fields.label: Web Services Sender ID
install_fields.placeholder: Enter your Intacct Web Services Sender ID
install_fields.help: Web Services Sender ID — assigned by Intacct support when you sign the Web Services agreement.

install_fields.label: Web Services Sender Password
install_fields.placeholder: Enter your Intacct Web Services Sender Password
install_fields.help: Web Services Sender Password — paired with the Sender ID by Intacct support.

install_fields.label: Intacct User ID
install_fields.help: Intacct user with Web Services privilege. Subscribe the user to Web Services in Company → Subscriptions.

install_fields.label: Intacct User Password
install_fields.help: Password for the Intacct user. We recommend a dedicated service user with API privilege.

install_fields.label: Intacct Company ID
install_fields.help: Intacct Company ID — also called Org ID. Found in Company → Information.

install_fields.label: Location ID (optional)
install_fields.help: Optional Location ID — restricts API requests to a specific location in a multi-entity company.

install_fields.label: Entity ID (optional)
install_fields.help: Optional Entity ID — restricts API requests to a specific entity in a multi-entity company.

install_fields.label: Intacct XML Gateway URL
install_fields.help: Base URL for the Intacct XML Gateway. Leave blank to use the production default.

install_fields.label: Rate Limit (requests/min)
install_fields.help: Maximum Intacct API requests per minute. Default is 30 (a conservative shared quota).

apis.name: Install Connector
apis.description: Validates the five required credentials and mints a getAPISession session_id (best-effort). Optional location_id / entity_id / base_url are also stored when provided.

apis.name: Authorize (No-Op)
apis.description: Sage Intacct uses static API credentials — there is no OAuth dance. This method exists for platform contract parity and returns a synthetic TokenInfo whose access_token is f'intacct:{company_id}'.

apis.name: Health Check
apis.description: Verifies the full credential chain by running a 1-row readByQuery on GLACCOUNT.

apis.name: Sync Catalog Objects
apis.description: Syncs CUSTOMER, VENDOR, and GLACCOUNT records into the Shielva knowledge base via readByQuery + readMore pagination. Each row is normalised to a NormalizedDocument with id=f'{tenant_id}_{source_id}'.

apis.name: readByQuery
apis.description: Run a generic readByQuery against any Intacct object.

apis.name: read (by primary key)
apis.description: Fetch one or more records by primary key on any Intacct object.

apis.name: readMore (paginate)
apis.description: Fetch next page of a prior readByQuery using its resultId.

apis.name: List Customers
apis.description: List Intacct customers via readByQuery on CUSTOMER.

apis.name: Get Customer
apis.description: Fetch a single CUSTOMER record by customerid.

apis.name: Create Customer
apis.description: Create a CUSTOMER record via the create_customer function.

apis.name: Update Customer
apis.description: Partial-update a CUSTOMER record via the update_customer function. Supports name, status, termname, currency, comments, entity.

apis.name: List Vendors
apis.description: List Intacct vendors via readByQuery on VENDOR.

apis.name: Get Vendor
apis.description: Fetch a single VENDOR record by vendorid.

apis.name: Create Vendor
apis.description: Create a VENDOR record via the create_vendor function.

apis.name: List Invoices
apis.description: List AR invoices via readByQuery on ARINVOICE.

apis.name: Create Invoice
apis.description: Create an ARINVOICE via the create_invoice function with one or more line items.

apis.name: List Bills
apis.description: List AP bills via readByQuery on APBILL.

apis.name: List Journal Entries
apis.description: List GL batches (journal entries) via readByQuery on GLBATCH.

apis.name: List GL Accounts
apis.description: List GL accounts via readByQuery on GLACCOUNT.

apis.name: List Chart of Accounts
apis.description: Alias of list_gl_accounts — list GL accounts via readByQuery on GLACCOUNT.

apis.name: List Employees
apis.description: List employees via readByQuery on EMPLOYEE.

apis.name: List Projects
apis.description: List projects via readByQuery on PROJECT.

apis.name: List Departments
apis.description: List departments via readByQuery on DEPARTMENT.

apis.name: List Locations
apis.description: List locations via readByQuery on LOCATION.

apis.name: Run Smart Event
apis.description: Invoke an Intacct Smart Event by name with an optional parameter map.
